description: Subscriptions module with plan management and professional count enforcement per plan for Medicano platform

context.dependencies: Sprint 02 must be complete — RolesGuard and @Roles() already exist

prompts.name: subscription-schema
prompts.description: Create the Subscription schema with plan enum and professional limits map

prompts.name: subscription-dtos
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class or field. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

SubscriptionPlan is at apps/api/src/subscriptions/schemas/subscription.schema.ts — import from there. Do NOT recreate it.
SubscriptionStatus is at apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts — import from there. Do NOT recreate it.
All DTO fields must be readonly.

Create apps/api/src/subscriptions/dto/create-subscription.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- clinicId: string — @IsMongoId()
- plan?: SubscriptionPlan — @IsEnum(SubscriptionPlan) @IsOptional()
- expiresAt: string — @IsDateString()

Create apps/api/src/subscriptions/dto/update-subscription.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- plan?: SubscriptionPlan — @IsEnum(SubscriptionPlan) @IsOptional()
- status?: SubscriptionStatus — @IsEnum(SubscriptionStatus) @IsOptional()
- expiresAt?: string — @IsDateString() @IsOptional()

Import validators from 'class-validator'. If any file already exists with the correct content, make no changes.

prompts.name: subscriptions-service
prompts.description: Create SubscriptionsService including enforceClinicProfessionalLimit used by ClinicProfessionalsService
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.service.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing method or import. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Import from the correct canonical paths — do NOT recreate any of these:
- Subscription, SubscriptionDocument, SubscriptionSchema, SubscriptionPlan, PLAN_PROFESSIONAL_LIMITS from './schemas/subscription.schema'
- SubscriptionStatus from '../clinics/schemas/clinic.schema'
- ClinicsService from '../clinics/clinics.service'
- CreateSubscriptionDto from './dto/create-subscription.dto'
- UpdateSubscriptionDto from './dto/update-subscription.dto'

Create apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.service.ts:

@Injectable() class SubscriptionsService:
- constructor injects:
  - @InjectModel(Subscription.name) private readonly subscriptionModel: Model<SubscriptionDocument>
  - private readonly clinicsService: ClinicsService

async create(dto: CreateSubscriptionDto): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
  - Validate dto.clinicId with Types.ObjectId.isValid(); throw NotFoundException('Invalid clinic ID: ' + dto.clinicId) if invalid
  - Call clinicsService.findById(dto.clinicId) to verify clinic exists (throws NotFoundException if not found)
  - try { return await this.subscriptionModel.create({ ...dto, clinicId: new Types.ObjectId(dto.clinicId), expiresAt: new Date(dto.expiresAt) }) }
  - catch (error) { if (error.code === 11000) throw new ConflictException('Subscription already exists for this clinic'); throw error; }

async findByClinicId(clinicId: string): Promise<SubscriptionDocument | null>
  - if (!Types.ObjectId.isValid(clinicId)) return null
  - return this.subscriptionModel.findOne({ clinicId: new Types.ObjectId(clinicId) }).exec()
  - Returns null if not found — absence of a subscription is a valid state (no NotFoundException)

async findById(id: string): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
  - if (!Types.ObjectId.isValid(id)) throw new NotFoundException('Invalid subscription ID: ' + id)
  - const subscription = await this.subscriptionModel.findById(id).exec()
  - if (!subscription) throw new NotFoundException('Subscription with ID ' + id + ' not found')
  - return subscription

async update(id: string, dto: UpdateSubscriptionDto): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
  - Validate id; call findById(id) to ensure it exists
  - const updateData: any = { ...dto }
  - if (dto.expiresAt) updateData.expiresAt = new Date(dto.expiresAt)
  - return this.subscriptionModel.findByIdAndUpdate(id, updateData, { new: true }).exec()

async cancel(id: string): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
  - return this.update(id, { status: SubscriptionStatus.INACTIVE })

async enforceClinicProfessionalLimit(clinicId: string, currentCount: number): Promise<void>
  - const subscription = await this.findByClinicId(clinicId)
  - const plan = subscription?.plan ?? SubscriptionPlan.FREE
  - const limit = PLAN_PROFESSIONAL_LIMITS[plan]
  - if (limit !== -1 && currentCount >= limit) throw new ForbiddenException('Professional limit reached for current subscription plan (' + plan + '): max ' + limit)

Import Injectable, NotFoundException, ConflictException, ForbiddenException from '@nestjs/common'. Import InjectModel from '@nestjs/mongoose'. Import Model, Types from 'mongoose'.

prompts.name: subscriptions-controller
prompts.description: Create SubscriptionsController with role-based access for clinic plan management
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.controller.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing method or decorator. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Import from the correct canonical paths — do NOT recreate any of these:
- JwtAuthGuard from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard'
- RolesGuard from '../auth/guards/roles.guard'
- Roles from '../auth/decorators/roles.decorator'
- Role from '../common/enums/role.enum'
- SubscriptionsService from './subscriptions.service'
- CreateSubscriptionDto from './dto/create-subscription.dto'
- UpdateSubscriptionDto from './dto/update-subscription.dto'
- SubscriptionDocument from './schemas/subscription.schema'

Create apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.controller.ts:

@Controller('subscriptions')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
export class SubscriptionsController

Endpoints:
- POST /subscriptions — @Roles(Role.CLINIC) — async create(@Body() dto: CreateSubscriptionDto): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
- GET /subscriptions/clinic/:clinicId — no @Roles — async findByClinicId(@Param('clinicId') clinicId: string): Promise<SubscriptionDocument | null>
- GET /subscriptions/:id — no @Roles — async findOne(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
- PUT /subscriptions/:id — @Roles(Role.CLINIC) — async update(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: UpdateSubscriptionDto): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>
- POST /subscriptions/:id/cancel — @Roles(Role.CLINIC) @HttpCode(200) — async cancel(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<SubscriptionDocument>

Note: GET /subscriptions/clinic/:clinicId must be declared BEFORE GET /subscriptions/:id to avoid NestJS routing conflicts.

Controllers contain no business logic — only receive, delegate to SubscriptionsService, and return.

prompts.name: subscriptions-module-and-app
prompts.description: Create SubscriptionsModule and register it in AppModule
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing import or module registration. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.module.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Module({
    imports: [
      MongooseModule.forFeature([{ name: Subscription.name, schema: SubscriptionSchema }]),
      ClinicsModule,
    ],
    controllers: [SubscriptionsController],
    providers: [SubscriptionsService],
    exports: [SubscriptionsService],
  })
  export class SubscriptionsModule
- Import Subscription, SubscriptionSchema from './schemas/subscription.schema'
- Import ClinicsModule from '../clinics/clinics.module' — needed so SubscriptionsService can inject ClinicsService

Update apps/api/src/app.module.ts:
- Add import of SubscriptionsModule from './subscriptions/subscriptions.module'
- Add SubscriptionsModule to the imports array
- Do NOT remove or modify any existing imports, modules, or configuration

If subscriptions.module.ts already exists with correct content, make no changes to it.

prompts.name: clinic-professionals-limit-enforcement
prompts.description: Update ClinicProfessionalsService and ClinicProfessionalsModule to enforce subscription plan limits
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read both files listed and check what is already implemented. Do not remove or duplicate existing logic, only add the subscription limit enforcement. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

SubscriptionsService is at apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.service.ts — import from there.
SubscriptionsModule is at apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.module.ts — import from there.

Update apps/api/src/professionals/clinic-professionals.service.ts:
- Add SubscriptionsService to the constructor injections: private readonly subscriptionsService: SubscriptionsService
- In assignProfessionalToClinic(), AFTER the existing validations (ObjectId checks and clinic/professional existence checks) but BEFORE saving the assignment, add:
  const currentCount = await this.clinicProfessionalModel.countDocuments({ clinicId: new Types.ObjectId(clinicId) });
  await this.subscriptionsService.enforceClinicProfessionalLimit(clinicId, currentCount);
- Do NOT change any other logic, method signatures, or existing validations

Update apps/api/src/professionals/clinic-professionals.module.ts:
- Add SubscriptionsModule to the imports array
- Add import of SubscriptionsModule from '../subscriptions/subscriptions.module'
- Do NOT remove any existing imports or module registrations

The dependency chain is: ClinicProfessionalsModule → SubscriptionsModule → ClinicsModule. There are no circular dependencies.

prompts.name: subscriptions-tests
prompts.description: Unit tests for SubscriptionsService covering CRUD and professional limit enforcement
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/subscriptions/tests/subscriptions.service.spec.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing test. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

SubscriptionsService is at apps/api/src/subscriptions/subscriptions.service.ts — import from there.
SubscriptionPlan, PLAN_PROFESSIONAL_LIMITS, SubscriptionDocument are at apps/api/src/subscriptions/schemas/subscription.schema.ts — import from there.
SubscriptionStatus is at apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts — import from there.

Create apps/api/src/subscriptions/tests/subscriptions.service.spec.ts if it does not already exist:
- Do NOT use real DB connections — mock subscriptionModel and ClinicsService with jest.fn()
- Mock subscriptionModel: findOne, findById, findByIdAndUpdate, create
- Mock ClinicsService: findById
- Provide via: { provide: getModelToken(Subscription.name), useValue: mockSubscriptionModel }
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())
- Use mockClinicId = new Types.ObjectId().toString()
- Use mockId = new Types.ObjectId().toString()

Tests to include:

describe('create'):
- 'should create subscription for a valid clinic': ClinicsService.findById returns clinic, subscriptionModel.create returns subscription
- 'should throw ConflictException when subscription already exists for clinic': subscriptionModel.create throws error with code 11000
- 'should throw NotFoundException when clinic does not exist': ClinicsService.findById throws NotFoundException

describe('findByClinicId'):
- 'should return subscription when found': findOne returns subscription
- 'should return null when not found': findOne returns null — must NOT throw
- 'should return null for invalid ObjectId without throwing': clinicId = 'invalid-id'

describe('findById'):
- 'should return subscription when found'
- 'should throw NotFoundException when not found': findById returns null
- 'should throw NotFoundException for invalid ObjectId'

describe('cancel'):
- 'should set status to INACTIVE and return updated subscription'

describe('enforceClinicProfessionalLimit'):
- 'should resolve without error when count is below FREE limit': findByClinicId returns null (defaults to FREE), currentCount = 1
- 'should resolve when count equals limit minus 1': FREE plan, currentCount = 1
- 'should throw ForbiddenException when count equals FREE limit': FREE plan, currentCount = 2
- 'should throw ForbiddenException when count exceeds BASIC limit': BASIC plan, currentCount = 10
- 'should never throw for PRO plan regardless of count': PRO plan, currentCount = 999
- 'should default to FREE limits when no subscription found': findByClinicId returns null, currentCount = 2 → throws ForbiddenException
